## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open VS Code with extension installed
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the Output panel or Developer Console.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / macOS 14 |
| VS Code version | e.g. 1.90.0 |
| Extension version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 18.19.0 |
| MCP client | e.g. Claude Desktop / Cursor / Zed |
| Transport used | http / stdio / both |

## Logs

Please paste relevant output from:
- **Help → Toggle Developer Tools → Console**
- **Output panel** (select "MCP Output Reader" channel)

```
paste logs here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots or config snippets.
